generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how underprepared we were during the 2020 crisis. Our agencies need better tools to act decisively when threats emerge. The new security measures aren't about overreach - they're about ensuring we can protect communities before it's too late. We owe it to our families to support law enforcement with the authority they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
